mechanism: If steepening reflects term premium expansion (not falling rate expectations), 5y5y forward at 4.0-4.5% means A&E strategies delay into equivalent or worse refinancing economics. Benign-appearing steepening traps borrowers in higher long-term rates.
regime_dependence: Holds as long as steepening is term-premium-driven. If composition shifts to rate-expectations-driven (Fed cutting), A&E economics improve.
